E : Type u_1

d : ℕ

L : StrongDual ℝ E
⊢ charFunDual (@ProbabilityTheory.stdGaussianMulti E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹) L =
    Complex.exp (-(↑(variance (⇑L) (@ProbabilityTheory.stdGaussianMulti E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹)) / 2))
